interview_prep.question: Describe your experience building microservices with FastAPI and how you handle authentication
related_cv_evidence: Microservices project using FastAPI for authentication and authorization
interview_prep.related_jd_requirement: Strong FastAPI experience for microservices architecture
interview_prep.why_this_question: FastAPI is a key requirement for this role
interview_prep.risk_if_user_cannot_answer: May indicate shallow FastAPI microservices knowledge

interview_prep.question: How have you optimized PostgreSQL queries in high-traffic applications?
related_cv_evidence: Production applications using PostgreSQL for data storage
interview_prep.why_this_question: Database optimization is critical for this backend role
interview_prep.risk_if_user_cannot_answer: May indicate inability to handle production database loads

interview_prep.question: Walk me through your Redis caching strategy and how you handle cache invalidation
related_cv_evidence: Redis used for caching and session management
interview_prep.why_this_question: Redis is required for performance optimization
interview_prep.risk_if_user_cannot_answer: May indicate lack of performance optimization experience

interview_prep.question: Tell me about a time you had to debug a production issue in a Python application
related_cv_evidence: Python used across all backend projects
interview_prep.risk_if_user_cannot_answer: May indicate limited production debugging experience

interview_prep.question: Describe a situation where you had to learn a new technology quickly for a project
related_cv_evidence: FastAPI, Redis, PostgreSQL all learned for projects
interview_prep.related_jd_requirement: Ability to adapt and learn new technologies
interview_prep.risk_if_user_cannot_answer: May indicate fixed mindset rather than growth mindset
